code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    print("")
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    mut current = 0
    mut has_digit = false
    mut negative = false
    mut sum = 0
    mut out = ""
    mut first = true
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when None
        i = n
      when Some(b)
        if b >= 48 and b <= 57
          current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
          has_digit = true
        else if b == 45 and not has_digit
          negative = true
        else
          if has_digit
            mut value = current
            if negative
              value = 0 - value
            end
            sum = sum + value
            if first
              out = "#{sum}"
              first = false
            else
              out = "#{out} #{sum}"
            end
            current = 0
            has_digit = false
            negative = false
          end
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if has_digit
      mut value = current
      if negative
        value = 0 - value
      end
      sum = sum + value
      if first
        out = "#{sum}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{sum}"
      end
    end
    print(out)
  end
end
